transcript: Okay, next two! Ooh! Pricey Helen. Ready? Go! Got some catching up to do, Mark! God, Helen, easy! Go! Look at this! Go on! Go, Harry! Yes! We've got Orsi, Danny. Ready? Go! Pricey, you're up. You have to go again. You've only done it once. Zara needs a partner. Go on, guys, keep it going. Well done, all the way down. Nice. Zara, you're up. There you go. OK. Ready? Three, two, one, go! Come on, Zara! Don't let the old man win! Come on! Go on, Pricey! That's right! Whoa-ho-ho! Come on, Pricey! Ooh! Oh! Yay! There you go!
